findings.title: cache key uses attacker-controlled context
findings.message: Cache key material is derived from attacker-controlled workflow context.
findings.remediation: Use trusted stable cache keys and avoid crossing trust boundaries between untrusted PR workflows and privileged workflows.

findings.title: untrusted context used in workflow data field
findings.message: Untrusted context is used in a cache key or artifact name.
findings.remediation: Use stable trusted identifiers or sanitize untrusted values before using them in workflow control fields.
